name: Stir-Fried Crab Curry - Poo Pad Pong Garee
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fresh crab in its shell to retain the sweetness of the meat.
2. Enjoy informally with friends and conversation.
3. Clean the crab by removing the shell from the body only. Disjoint the legs and crack the shell of the legs with a mallet. Rinse to remove small pieces of shell, then drain and set aside.
4. Heat a wok or large skillet on medium-high heat. Add oil, garlic, and onion. Stir-fry for 30 seconds.
5. Add the cracked crab pieces and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Add all remaining ingredients except egg, cilantro, and green onions.
7. Cover the skillet and continue cooking on medium-high heat for another 3 minutes, or until the crab is cooked.
8. Add the egg and stir to combine thoroughly.
9. Remove to a serving dish and garnish with cilantro and green onions.
